channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-06
item.description: AlphaFold2's confidence scores, particularly pLDDT and pTM, are unreliable for predicting fold-switching proteins, according to a new bioRxiv preprint. | The available text does not provide details on the core claim, method, key evidence, why it matters, limitations, or terms from the source article. | Researchers have introduced RePaRank, a new computational architecture designed to efficiently predict antibody-antigen interfaces.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: AlphaFold2's confidence scores, particularly pLDDT and pTM, are unreliable for predicting fold-switching proteins, according to a new bioRxiv preprint. | The available text does not provide details on the core claim, method, key evidence, why it matters, limitations, or terms from the source article. | Researchers have introduced RePaRank, a new computational architecture designed to efficiently predict antibody-antigen interfaces.
